creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Please send us a dmesg, output of `pciconf -lv' and `kldstat' as I'm pretty 
sure our guessworkers are on vacation currently :) 
Also please be aware of the fact, you're running a soon to be EOL'd 
version of FreeBSD and should consider upgrading your system to either 6.3-R 
or 7.0-R. Also please give us information about which Xorg version you're 
using.
